place: Lamai, Maret, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Two-Bedroom Garden Pool Villa in Lamai
blurb: A peaceful two-bedroom pool villa tucked into a quiet Lamai residence, around three kilometres from the beach and the town's cafés and markets. Single-storey living wraps a private pool and lush garden, with an open kitchen, king-size en-suite bedrooms and a bright, breezy interior — fully furnished and move-in ready on a registered lease. ฿7,500,000.
detail:
Set in a quiet residential pocket of Lamai on Koh Samui's south-east coast, this single-storey villa is an easy, private retreat framed by a lush tropical garden. The plot is flat and generous — 460 m² of land around 295 m² of built space — and the location is genuinely convenient: roughly three kilometres to Lamai's beach and town, and about fifteen minutes to the airport.

Living is arranged on one level around a private swimming pool. An open-plan kitchen with a central island runs into a bright living room with a sofa and smart TV, opening through glass to the pool terrace and garden. Both double bedrooms have a king-size bed, built-in wardrobe, air-conditioning and a private en-suite bathroom with a walk-in shower.

Every room is air-conditioned with ceiling fans throughout, and the villa comes fully furnished and equipped — a modern kitchen with dishwasher and coffee machine, a laundry, and a garden made for slow mornings. The villa is held on a registered leasehold with approximately 22 years and 10 months remaining, running to May 2049, and is ready to move into. Lease terms, floor plan and full inventory on request.
